allow: Bash(php -r 'ob_start\(\); include "equipamentos-catalogo.php"; $r = ob_get_clean\(\); $j = json_decode\($r, true\); foreach \($j["itens"] as $it\) { if \(stripos\($it["nome"], "virot"\) !== false\) echo $it["nome"] . " => " . $it["espacos"] . "\\n"; }')

Bash(php -r 'ob_start\(\); include "armaduras-catalogo.php"; $r = ob_get_clean\(\); $j = json_decode\($r, true\); if \(!$j["success"]\) { echo "ERRO: " . $j["error"]; exit; } echo "Total: " . $j["total"] . "\\n\\n"; foreach \($j["itens"] as $it\) { echo str_pad\($it["nome"], 22\) . " [" . $it["tipo"] . "] | bonus: +" . $it["bonus"] . " | pen: " . $it["penalidade"] . " | esp: " . $it["espacos"] . " | secao: " . $it["secao"] . "\\n"; }')

Bash(php -r '$j = json_decode\(file_get_contents\("data/ancestralidades.json"\), true\); if \(json_last_error\(\) === JSON_ERROR_NONE\) { echo "JSON ok. Total: " . count\($j["ancestralidades"]\) . " ancestralidades\\n"; foreach \($j["ancestralidades"] as $a\) echo "  - " . $a["nome"] . " \(" . $a["id"] . "\)\\n"; } else { echo "ERRO: " . json_last_error_msg\(\); }')

Bash(php -r '$j = json_decode\(file_get_contents\("data/magias.json"\), true\); $div1 = array_filter\($j["magias"], fn\($m\) => \($m["tipo"] ?? ""\) === "Divina" && \($m["circulo"] ?? 0\) == 1\); echo "Total divinas círculo 1: " . count\($div1\) . "\\n"; $sample = array_slice\(array_values\($div1\), 0, 3\); foreach \($sample as $m\) echo "  " . $m["id"] . " | tipo=" . $m["tipo"] . " | circulo=" . $m["circulo"] . "\\n";')

Bash(php -r '$j = json_decode\(file_get_contents\("data/ancestralidades.json"\), true\); if \(json_last_error\(\) !== JSON_ERROR_NONE\) { echo "ERRO: " . json_last_error_msg\(\); exit; } $count = 0; foreach \($j["ancestralidades"] as $a\) { foreach \($a["tracos"] as $t\) { if \(isset\($t["concede_magias"]\)\) { $count++; $cm = $t["concede_magias"]; $opc = $cm["opcoes"] ?? []; $f = $cm["filtro"] ?? null; echo "  ✓ {$a[\\"nome\\"]} > {$t[\\"nome\\"]}: limite={$cm[\\"limite\\"]}, "; if \($f\) echo "filtro={$f[\\"tipo\\"]}/circ={$f[\\"circulo\\"]}"; else echo "opcoes=[" . implode\(",", $opc\) . "]"; if \(isset\($cm["atributo_chave"]\)\) echo " atrib={$cm[\\"atributo_chave\\"]}"; echo "\\n"; } } } echo "Total traços com concede_magias: $count\\n";')

Bash(php -r '$j = json_decode\(file_get_contents\("data/ancestralidades.json"\), true\); if \(json_last_error\(\) !== JSON_ERROR_NONE\) { echo "ERRO JSON: " . json_last_error_msg\(\); exit; } foreach \($j["ancestralidades"] as $a\) { foreach \($a["tracos"] as $t\) { if \(!isset\($t["concede_magias"]\)\) continue; $cm = $t["concede_magias"]; $info = "limite=" . $cm["limite"]; if \(isset\($cm["filtro"]\)\) { $info .= ", filtro=" . $cm["filtro"]["tipo"] . "/circ" . $cm["filtro"]["circulo"]; } else { $info .= ", opcoes=" . count\($cm["opcoes"] ?? []\); } if \(isset\($cm["atributo_chave"]\)\) $info .= ", atrib=" . $cm["atributo_chave"]; echo $a["nome"] . " > " . $t["nome"] . ": " . $info . "\\n"; } }')

Bash(php -r '$j = json_decode\(file_get_contents\("data/ancestralidades.json"\), true\); if \(json_last_error\(\) !== JSON_ERROR_NONE\) { echo "ERRO: " . json_last_error_msg\(\); exit; } foreach \($j["ancestralidades"] as $a\) foreach \($a["tracos"] as $t\) if \(isset\($t["concede_ataque"]\)\) echo $a["nome"] . " > " . $t["nome"] . " concede ataque: " . $t["concede_ataque"]["nome"] . " \(" . $t["concede_ataque"]["dano"] . "\)\\n";')

Bash(awk '/"id": "[a-z-]+",$/ && match\($0, /"id": "\([a-z-]+\)"/, a\) { last_id = a[1] } /"nome":/ { last_nome = $0 } /\\+[0-9]+ em / { print "Linha " NR ": " last_id " | " $0 }' c:/xampp/htdocs/pindorama-ficha/data/ancestralidades.json)

Bash(php -r '$j = json_decode\(file_get_contents\("data/ancestralidades.json"\), true\); if \(json_last_error\(\) !== JSON_ERROR_NONE\) { echo "ERRO: " . json_last_error_msg\(\); exit; } echo "Bônus de perícias por ancestralidade:\\n"; foreach \($j["ancestralidades"] as $a\) foreach \($a["tracos"] as $t\) if \(isset\($t["bonus_pericias"]\)\) { $b = []; foreach \($t["bonus_pericias"] as $bp\) $b[] = "+" . $bp["valor"] . " " . $bp["pericia"]; echo "  " . $a["nome"] . " > " . $t["nome"] . ": " . implode\(", ", $b\) . "\\n"; }')
Bash(awk '/"id":/ { last_id=$0 } /tamanho é \(Min|Peq|Méd|Gran|Eno|Col\)/ { print "Linha " NR ": " last_id ": " $0 }' c:/xampp/htdocs/pindorama-ficha/data/ancestralidades.json)

Bash(php -r '$j = json_decode\(file_get_contents\("data/ancestralidades.json"\), true\); if \(json_last_error\(\) !== JSON_ERROR_NONE\) { echo "ERRO: " . json_last_error_msg\(\); exit; } echo "Bônus de perícias por ancestralidade:\\n"; foreach \($j["ancestralidades"] as $a\) foreach \($a["tracos"] as $t\) if \(isset\($t["bonus_pericias"]\)\) { $b = []; foreach \($t["bonus_pericias"] as $bp\) $b[] = \($bp["valor"] >= 0 ? "+" : ""\) . $bp["valor"] . " " . $bp["pericia"]; echo "  " . $a["nome"] . " > " . $t["nome"] . ": " . implode\(", ", $b\) . "\\n"; }')

Bash(php -r '$j = json_decode\(file_get_contents\("data/ancestralidades.json"\), true\); if \(json_last_error\(\) !== JSON_ERROR_NONE\) { echo "ERRO: " . json_last_error_msg\(\); exit; } foreach \($j["ancestralidades"] as $a\) foreach \($a["tracos"] as $t\) if \(isset\($t["concede_ataque"]\)\) echo $a["nome"] . " > " . $t["nome"] . ": " . $t["concede_ataque"]["nome"] . " \(" . $t["concede_ataque"]["dano"] . ", " . $t["concede_ataque"]["critico"] . ", " . $t["concede_ataque"]["tipo"] . "\)\\n";')

Bash(php -r '$j = json_decode\(file_get_contents\("data/ancestralidades.json"\), true\); if \(json_last_error\(\) !== JSON_ERROR_NONE\) { echo "ERRO: " . json_last_error_msg\(\); exit; } foreach \($j["ancestralidades"] as $a\) foreach \($a["tracos"] as $t\) if \(isset\($t["bonus_atributos"]\)\) { $b = []; foreach \($t["bonus_atributos"] as $ba\) $b[] = \($ba["valor"] >= 0 ? "+" : ""\) . $ba["valor"] . " " . $ba["atributo"]; echo $a["nome"] . " > " . $t["nome"] . ": " . implode\(", ", $b\) . "\\n"; }')
